scenarios.situationKo: 당신은 카페에서 원하는 음료를 주문해야 합니다.
scenarios.descriptionKo: 음료, 크기, 포장 여부를 영어로 말하는 연습입니다.
scenarios.userGoalKo: 원하는 음료, 크기, 포장 여부를 말하고 주문을 완료하세요.
scenarios.openingMessage: Hi, what would you like to order?
scenarios.completionMessage: Got it. I'll have that ready at the pickup counter.

repairPolicy.unclear: Sorry, could you say that again in English?
repairPolicy.offTopic: Let us come back to this situation. What do you need?
repairPolicy.correction: No problem. Thanks for correcting that.
repairPolicy.koreanOnly: Please try saying that in English.

successCriteria: Say whether it is for here or to go.

requiredSlots.label: drink
requiredSlots.prompt: Sure. What would you like to drink?

requiredSlots.label: size
requiredSlots.prompt: Sure. What size would you like?

requiredSlots.label: for here or to go
requiredSlots.prompt: Is that for here or to go?

scenarios.situationKo: 당신은 호텔 프런트에서 예약한 방에 체크인해야 합니다.
scenarios.descriptionKo: 이름, 예약, 숙박 정보를 간단히 말하는 연습입니다.
scenarios.userGoalKo: 이름을 말하고 예약 확인과 체크인을 완료하세요.
scenarios.openingMessage: Hello, welcome to our hotel. How can I help you?
scenarios.completionMessage: Perfect. You're checked in. Here is your room key.

repairPolicy.unclear: Sorry, could you say that again in English?
repairPolicy.offTopic: Let us come back to this situation. What do you need?
repairPolicy.correction: No problem. Thanks for correcting that.
repairPolicy.koreanOnly: Please try saying that in English.

successCriteria: Say that you have a reservation.
Respond to the ID or passport request.

requiredSlots.label: guest name
requiredSlots.prompt: May I have your name, please?

requiredSlots.label: id or passport
requiredSlots.prompt: May I see your ID or passport?

scenarios.situationKo: 당신은 길에서 지하철역 위치를 물어봐야 합니다.
scenarios.userGoalKo: 지하철역 위치를 묻고, 방향을 확인한 뒤 감사 인사를 하세요.
scenarios.completionMessage: Sure. Go straight for two blocks, then turn left. It will be on your right.

repairPolicy.unclear: Sorry, could you say that again in English?
repairPolicy.offTopic: Let us come back to this situation. What do you need?
repairPolicy.correction: No problem. Thanks for correcting that.
repairPolicy.koreanOnly: Please try saying that in English.

requiredSlots.label: destination
requiredSlots.prompt: Where would you like to go?

scenarios.titleEn: Buying Something at a Convenience Store
scenarios.situationKo: 편의점에서 원하는 물건을 말하고 계산해야 합니다.
scenarios.descriptionKo: 간단한 구매 요청과 결제 표현을 연습합니다.
scenarios.userGoalKo: 사고 싶은 물건을 말하고 결제 방법을 말하세요.
scenarios.completionMessage: Sure. You can pay over here.

successCriteria: Say what you want to buy.

requiredSlots.label: payment method
requiredSlots.prompt: How would you like to pay?

scenarios.situationKo: 버스 터미널에서 목적지와 표 한 장을 말해야 합니다.
scenarios.userGoalKo: 목적지와 표 수량을 말하고 표를 받으세요.
scenarios.completionMessage: Here is your ticket. The bus leaves soon.

scenarios.situationKo: 상대가 전화를 받을 수 없어 짧은 메시지를 남겨야 합니다.

scenarios.userGoalKo: 이해하지 못했다고 말하고 다시 설명을 요청하세요.
